mnemonics: Lazy Fox Jumps Over Regular Expressions: Lexical Analysis Finds Just Only Regular Symbols (Lexemes, Finite Automata, Jumps Over, Regular Expressions, Lexemes, Symbols)
keyPoints: Converts source code into tokens using a finite automaton
Interacts with the symbol table to store identifiers
commonMistakes: Confusing the lexer (tokenizer) with the parser (which deals with grammar)
Forgetting that the lexer is based on regular grammar, not context-free grammar
